summary: Iteration 16: Complete E2E workflow test for Service Contract Management System. Database was cleared and tested full workflow: Admin login -> Create Form -> Client Fill -> Admin creates Proposal -> Client accepts -> Client signs Agreement -> PDF generation (both standard and bilingual AR/EN). All 21 backend tests passed (100%). UI tests verified all main flows work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Bilingual PDF generator correctly uses Amiri Arabic font for proper Arabic text rendering
Full workflow from form creation to PDF generation works correctly
RTL layout is properly implemented across all pages
Public endpoints (form, proposal, agreement, PDF) work without authentication as designed
seed_data_creation: Created 1 application form, 1 proposal, 1 agreement during E2E testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full E2E workflow tested and working. Database was cleared before testing. The workflow creates: Application Form -> Client submits -> Admin creates Proposal -> Client accepts -> Agreement signed -> Contract PDF generated. Bilingual PDF uses Amiri fonts for proper Arabic rendering.

findings: Data tables display properly with RTL support
Admin can create forms with client info
Access token generated for public access
Form link can be copied and shared
6 steps visible: Company Info, Certification Selection, Sites & Employees, etc.
Save draft and Submit functions work
Auto-calculated audit duration: 9.35 man-days for ISO9001+ISO14001 with 50 employees
Admin can create proposals from submitted forms
Agreement form loads after proposal acceptance
Both admin and public endpoints work
Amiri-Regular.ttf and Amiri-Bold.ttf fonts present in /app/backend/fonts/
PDF contains embedded Amiri font references
Arabic text renders correctly (no black boxes)
Both English and Arabic content present

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending real emails (SMTP not configured)
